text:
Eygene Ryabinkin wrote:
> Sure, 0.9.5. is clean from this issue as the VuXML entry suggests:
> '>=0.9.0.20080223<0.9.5'.

This would be my misunderstanding. I thought the line inclusive because 
in my haste I didn't pay attention to the markup around it. Just wanted 
to make sure it didn't flag a wrong version though.

No objections. Commit away.
